qualitative_anchors.expected_behavior: Agent cites Note 15 (or equivalent segment note) that hedging gains (losses) related to revenue are NOT allocated to reportable segments
qualitative_anchors.reference_text: Additionally, hedging gains (losses) related to revenue are not allocated to our segments.

qualitative_anchors.expected_behavior: Agent treats Q1 2026 hedging as a loss of $180M (negative), not a positive gain

required_narrative_points: Sum of Google Services, Google Cloud, and Other Bets ($110,076M) exceeds consolidated revenue without hedging adjustment
Hedging gains (losses) of $(180)M is the reconciling item for Q1 2026
Filing states hedging gains (losses) related to revenue are not allocated to segments

failure_modes.label: Blind sum
failure_modes.description: Agent sums the three segments (110,076) and treats that as consolidated total, omitting hedging

failure_modes.label: Sign error
failure_modes.description: Agent finds hedging but adds +180 instead of subtracting the (180) loss

failure_modes.label: Wrong period
failure_modes.description: Agent pulls from FY2025 annual, Q1 2025 comparative column, or stale filing

failure_modes.label: Wrong filing
failure_modes.description: Agent uses 10-K or wrong quarter instead of specified Q1 2026 10-Q

failure_modes.label: Hedging as segment
failure_modes.description: Agent treats hedging as a fourth operating segment rather than a reconciling item

annual_reference_fy2025.note: Latest annual filing for cross-check only — not the scored period

expert_sign_off.notes: Q1 2026 numbers verified against Alphabet 10-Q filed 2026-04-30. Failure modes and table-level citations added post-review.
